source.note: Corrected setup strategy: 4 purple/orange+ chests before final quarter, then ? fill.

conclusions: Only four strategy cards are displayed to preserve page flow.
4 Purple+ Setup → ? Fill best matches the described practical routing plan.
The top three value profiles are close in the corrected 1k validation; do not overstate the rank gap.
Chest First Completion remains the best completion-rate profile, not the top value profile.

strategies.label: 4 Purple+ Setup → ? Fill
strategies.title: 4 Purple+ Setup → ? Fill
strategies.cardSummary: Aim for a mix of 4 purple/orange+ chests before the last quarter, using relevant upgrades, then fill value with ? tiles.
strategies.profile: This profile matches the practical plan: build toward roughly four purple-or-better chests through natural hits or upgrade cards before the final quarter, pick efficient low chests when convenient, and prioritize ? tiles as the main fill value.
strategies.useWhen: Use when the board has realistic purple+ or upgrade paths and you want to mix premium setup with ? tile value.
strategies.avoidWhen: Avoid forcing it when purple+ paths are too expensive or the board only offers low chest detours.
notes: Rank #1 by a narrow margin in the corrected 1k matched batch.
Purple+ setup first; ? tiles are the preferred fill; low chests only when efficient.

strategies.label: Balanced
strategies.title: Balanced
strategies.cardSummary: General-purpose baseline. Close to the top and less specialized than the setup plan.
strategies.profile: Stable baseline profile. It stayed close to the top in the corrected 1,000-run validation batch and remains the least specialized default.
strategies.useWhen: Use when you want a general route that is not over-specialized.
strategies.avoidWhen: Avoid when you specifically want the premium setup plan or max chest completion.
notes: Very close to the top profile in the corrected 1k matched batch.
Baseline/default comparison point for future testing.

strategies.label: Purple Before ?
strategies.title: Purple Before ?
strategies.cardSummary: Takes ? seriously, but does not skip known purple+ value for blind variance.
strategies.profile: Known-value profile. It prefers purple+ chest value before committing too hard to ? variance.
strategies.useWhen: Use when you want a simple value-first route: purple+ before blind ? chasing.
strategies.avoidWhen: Avoid when you want the more explicit 4-purple+ setup target or max chest count.
notes: Still competitive in the corrected 1k matched batch.
Known purple+ value first, then ? as high-value variance.

strategies.label: Chest First
strategies.title: Chest First Completion
strategies.cardSummary: Best completion-rate profile. Collects more chests, but gives up average value compared with value/setup routes.
strategies.profile: Quantity-first route profile. It had the highest 7-chest completion rate in the corrected 1,000-run validation batch.
strategies.useWhen: Use when you care about chest count, 7-chest completion, or Undetermined Fate ticket volume.
strategies.avoidWhen: Avoid when average chest value matters more than count.
notes: Highest 7-chest completion rate in the corrected 1k matched batch.
Lower average value than setup/value profiles.
